baseline_guidance: Run each eval with this skill and compare it against a no-skill baseline or previous-version snapshot using the same prompt and inputs.

evals.prompt: Figure out which install, test, lint, and build commands to use in this repo.
evals.expected_output: A toolchain diagnosis based on lockfiles, manifests, configs, Makefile targets, and workflows.
assertions: Inspects lockfiles and package or project manifests.
Checks Makefile and CI workflows when present.
Avoids assuming npm, Bun, Go, Python, or Scarb without evidence.
